channel.title: The Liminal by Fox and Thistle Studio
channel.description: A monthly creative almanac weaving art, poetry, sustainability, and seasonal reflections.
channel.author: liminal@foxandthistle.studio (Richard W. Saunders)

image.title: The Liminal by Fox and Thistle Studio

item.title: The Liminal - Pink Moon Cycle - March 2026
item.description: Festina Lente—Part Three: Transformation, Dive Bar Ensemble, Pride in the Post, Generational Cookware, Structural Silence, Sideways Progress, Tradewinds, Art Nouveau Monograms Offer, & Prince George's Crab Cakes

item.title: The Liminal - Worm Moon Cycle - February 2026
item.description: Time Keeping with a Buffalo Hide, Whirlpools in a Stream, Rabbit & Snail Meditation, English Brass Rubbing, Everlasting Flowers, A Cursed To-Do List, Variegated Leaves, Cuniculi Caracoulus Stewius, & What Might a Hero Be?

item.title: The Liminal - Snow Moon Cycle - January 2026
item.description: A creative almanac that drops on each new moon. Stepping Stones, Early Italian Printing, Necessary Limitations, Dolphin & Anchor, Grief & Guardianship, Winter Pruning, Meditation on Uncertainty, Winter Lentils Recipe, and the 2025 Doomsday Hintercast.

item.title: The Liminal - Wolf Moon Cycle - December 2025
item.description: A creative almanac that drops on each new moon. The Good Montell paper mouse collages, Mummers Parade in Philadelphia, vintage Bobo sun mask and clown portraits, optical illusions, poetry from Unpositions, Gullah Geechee Hoppin' John recipe, and seasonal reflections on the Wolf Moon cycle.

item.title: The Liminal – Cold Moon Cycle – November 2025
item.description: A creative almanac that drops on each new moon. Holiday Gifting Guide, Thanksgiving Sale, Festive Playlist, Post Impressionism, Ancient Ibex, Upcycled Piano Bar, Persona Masks, Break-up Cards, Post Office Box, Katagami, The Golden Ratio, Candied Sweet Potatoes, Eggnog Recipe, and thoughts on excess...

item.title: The Liminal - Hunter Moon Cycle - October 2025
item.description: Under October's Hunter Moon, The Liminal unfurls autumn's quiet mysteries: a 2026 Fortnight Calendar, Seasonal poems from Alix Klingenberg, Scottish Loom Work, Maritime Arches, 16th-century Absurdism, Lost Friends, and a Four-Toed Feetloaf Recipe. Explore Twilight at Fox & Thistle Studio.

item.title: The Liminal - Harvest Moon Cycle - September 2025
item.description: Ripe apples, late pears, persimmons, and more. A creative almanac with poetry, recipes, and reflections on the Harvest Moon cycle, dropping with each New Moon.
